# State of Computer Use / GUI Agent Models — Early 2026

## 1. Top Models for Computer Use Right Now

### Anthropic Claude (Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6)
Currently the strongest general-purpose computer use models available via API. Both score ~72.5–72.7% on OSWorld-Verified, which is near the human baseline of ~72.36%. The progression over 16 months was remarkable: 14.9% (Sonnet 3.5) → 28% → 42.2% → 61.4% (Sonnet 4.5) → 72.5%...(truncated)
